real_interview.content: <sync>

IntroV4Confirmation (hi i'm ellie thanks for coming in today i was created to talk to people in a safe and secure environment i'm not a therapist but i'm here to learn about people and would love to learn about you i'll ask a few questions to get us started and please feel free to tell me anything your answers are totally confidential are you ok with this)
yes i am
okay_confirm (okay)
how_doingV (so how are you doing today)
i'm doing great
thats_good (that's good)
where_originally (where are you from originally)
i am originally from venezuela
really (really)
when_LA (when did you move to l_a)
i was two years old
very_young (you were very young weren't you)
yes i was
often_backB (how often do you go back to your hometown)
um been only once
why2 (why)
i do not have family there anymore uh my uh siblings live in florida nowadays
aw (aw)
okay_confirm (okay)
like_about_LA (what are some things you really like about l_a)
wow there's so many things i like about l_a i like the weather i like people
overall i think the weather we're very lucky here
mhm (mhm)
dont_like_LA (what are some things you don't really like about l_a)
traffic
see_mean (i see what you mean)
travel_shoes (i'm sure you can tell by my shoes i'm not much of a world explorer do you travel a lot)
uh i have traveled some
travel_changed (what do you enjoy about traveling)
meeting new people and doing new learning about new cultures
i enjoy languages
uh traveling itself
travel_trips (i'd love to hear about one of your trips)
i have traveled to italy uh i lived there for seven and a half years and i studied abroad
i've uh visit a few countries through europe and i had a real good time
memorableB (what's one of your most memorable experiences)
um probably traveling uh through rail along europe and getting to know cities in that way
awesome (awesome)
shyoutgoing (do you consider yourself more shy or outgoing)
totally outgoing
relax_fishtank (sometimes when i'm feeling tense i turn on the fish tank screensaver hey i know it's not hawaii but it's the best i've got what do you do to relax)
i do meditation
hard_decision (how did you decide to do that)
um
it's usually a practice that you can becomes very natural so my body's able to
um
sense when i'm not feeling at ease and i naturally um
breathe and start my meditation process
difficult (how hard is that)
mm it could be hard if you don't practice it every day or if you're not able to quiet your mind
however if you um meditate for a long time it becomes a practice like going to the gym or
drinking your daily water um you can naturally learn to meditate
uh_huh (uh huh)
control_temper (how are you at controlling your temper)
i think pretty good
last_argument (when was the last time you argued with someone and what was it about)
i typically do not argue uh
and i don't remember any instance of arguing with someone recently
okay_confirm (okay)
situation_handled (tell me about a situation that you wish you had handled differently)
maybe being on the freeway and taking the wrong exit <laughter>
wild_laughter3 ((laughter))
i would've probably paid attention to uh my uh probably g_p_s or not being over confident
see_mean (i see what you mean)
hard_decisionB (tell me about the hardest decision you've ever had to make)
hardest decision i ever had to make uh
i guess moving back from europe to l_a  coming back home <laughter> i miss my friends
change_directions (what made you decide to do that)
it was time to come back i had done my schooling and it was time to come back home see my parents and join my family
family_relationship (tell me about your relationship with your family)
i love my family they're the core of my life
i have a nephew he's uh six years old and he's the love of my life
love them all
good_hear (that's so good to hear)
influence_positive (who's someone that's been a positive influence in your life)
my teachers uh my parents and definitely my mentors
okay_confirm (okay)
memory_erase (tell me about an event or something that you wish you could erase from your memory)
well i don't think i have anything that bad that i want to erase from my memory um
i can't think of any sorry <laughter>
okay_confirm (okay)
feelguilty (what's something you feel guilty about)
guilty about
i don't think i have anything to feel guilty about
however sometimes i feel guilty when i eat a lot of cookies 'cause that is not good for my health <laughter>
okay_confirm (okay)
easy_sleep (how easy is it for you to get a good night's sleep)
very easy i sleep like a baby once i hit the bed <laughter>
thats_good (that's good)
feel_lately (how have you been feeling lately)
i've been feeling good
behavior_changes (have you noticed any changes in your behavior or thoughts lately)
no
okay_confirm (okay)
happy_lasttime (tell me about the last time you felt really happy)
i felt really happy about two months ago
i went to a
friend's birthday she celebrated in a casino by a city away from los angeles
san bernadino and i was playing with a twenty five cents with quarters and i won like seventy five dollars in the machine so that was very cool <laughter>
nice (nice)
BF_describe (how would your best friend describe you)
uh
outgoing always planning something exciting to do
um very outspoken
regret (is there anything you regret)
mm not that i know of no
advice_back (what advice would you give to yourself ten or twenty years ago)
oh
always do what you want to do life is short and um always
keep on learning
self_change (what are some things you wish you could change about yourself)
uh i want to lose two more pounds
okay_confirm (okay)
feelbadly (tell me about a time when someone made you feel really badly about yourself)
i i've been very very blessed i've never really felt anyone make me feel bad
and i usually interact well with everyone i meet and i'm very blessed to have everyone be nice to me
thats_great (that's great)
Ellie17Dec2012_07 (what would you say are some of your best qualities)
i'm a great listener uh
i spend quality time with my friends and family
uh not quantity necessarily but quality time
and i'm very supportive and i love to pretty much listen listen and listen sometimes that's all people need
mhm (mhm)
study (what did you study at school)
i went to school um i have two degrees
um business management um uh degree and also i have a language degree
sounds_interesting (that sounds interesting)
hard_decision (how did you decide to do that)
i learned languages when i was very little uh had the opportunity to travel
and it was easier for me to keep on learning languages
and uh the business part i enjoy interacting with people creating um new ideas
uh innovating
so i believe that's where my interested in uh business came from mhm
mhm (mhm)
still_working_on_X (are you still working in that)
yes i am
dream_job (what's your dream job)
<laughter> my dream job one that wouldn't have probably challenges every day
uh one that i could uh
i don't know i'd just come to the office and everybody and everything would be perfect but
uh it's not real so uh i think one of the main things about having a a job is enjoying those challenges
yeah_downer (yeah)
Ellie17Dec2012_08 (what are you most proud of in your life)
very proud of myself
uh my accomplishments
and i'm also very proud of my family
and my friends
and how they have uh
uh achieved and overcome their obstacles
give_example (can you give me an example of that)
um sure i have a friend of mine who is now in new york state university
she had quite some challenges trying to get there and funding her education and now she is um
uh not only in the school but she hosts has acquired uh some funding for her education through a lot of writing letters and petitions and things she did
in order to conquer her dream to be in school so very proud of her
thats_great (that's great)
asked_everything (okay i think i have asked everything i need to)
appreciate_open (thanks for sharing your thoughts with me)
thank you
bye (goodbye)
goodbye
